_comment: Synthetic sample run — deterministic, no real customer data. Committed so reviewers can see the harness output shape on a FAILING scenario. The postmortem is in NOTE.md alongside this file.

axes.name: barge_in_recovery
axes.detail: agent continued speaking 1.8s after caller began interrupting; expected yield within 400ms

axes.name: tool_call_schema
axes.detail: n/a — no tool call in this scenario

axes.name: total_turn_p95_ms
axes.detail: p95 = 3450ms (budget ≤ 3000ms) — driven by the post-barge-in re-plan latency

axes.name: tone_judge
axes.detail: tone remained polite after the interrupt; judge: claude-haiku-4-5

transcript_summary.text: Sure — I can help with that. We have garages in Cheyenne, Laramie, and Casper, and the typical—
[INTERRUPTS at 8.2s] Wait, just Cheyenne — I'm in Cheyenne.
Got it, Cheyenne. Let me confirm — what's your address?
